overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (likely Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character in a tan coat and hat walking through a historic New Orleans-style city at night. The scene features gas street lamps illuminating cobblestone streets, palm trees, and 19th-century architecture with wrought iron balconies, while snow or ash falls gently through the hazy night air.

events.description: character approaches the entrance of the Henry Gosling building and slows slightly

large circular stone planter with ferns and metal railing

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a tranquil palm tree plaza at night, passing wooden benches and a central stone planter. Warm gas lamps illuminate the path toward the Henry Gosling building, a historic two-story structure with an ornate balcony and glowing signage. An NPC sits on a bench to the right as the character approaches the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk along historic street with iron fence

events.description: turns left from the plaza onto the narrow sidewalk beside the iron fence
a street tram becomes visible in the distance approaching the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk next to the wrought iron fence, approaching the intersection where a tram is visible

notable_agents.action: street tram approaching the intersection in the distance with headlights visible

entered.detail: black wrought iron fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
red and white streetcar approaching on tracks with interior lights visible

segments.scene_description: The character turns onto a narrow sidewalk bordered by a wrought iron fence on the right and historic buildings on the left. The Henry Gosling building recedes into the background left as the character walks toward an intersection. A street tram becomes visible in the distance, its headlights cutting through the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone intersection with tram tracks and crossing pedestrians

events.description: the street tram passes through the intersection from left to right
character crosses the cobblestone intersection alongside other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide cobblestone intersection while a tram passes through and other pedestrians cross in various directions

notable_agents.action: street tram moving through the intersection with passengers visible through windows
group of pedestrians crossing the intersection in the same direction

entered.detail: wide open cobblestone plaza with tram tracks embedded in the stones
three-story historic building with lit windows at the street corner

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide cobblestone intersection as the character crosses alongside other pedestrians. A street tram passes through from left to right, its windows glowing with warm light. Historic buildings surround the open space, their facades illuminated by street lamps, while the character navigates through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with parked carriages and storefronts

events.description: passing a parked horse-drawn carriage on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the cobblestone street past parked carriages and scattered pedestrians, continuing through the historic district

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked on the street with driver seated on the bench

entered.detail: black enclosed carriage with large wheels and a driver in period clothing
empty wooden benches along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues down a medium-width cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. A horse-drawn carriage is parked on the left side of the street, while wooden benches line the right sidewalk. The street is quieter than the intersection, with sparse pedestrian traffic and warm gas lamps casting long shadows on the wet cobblestones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a tranquil, lamp-lit plaza into the narrower, hazy corridors of a historic city street. It begins by trailing a character through a palm tree plaza, passing wooden benches and a central stone planter under the warm glow of gas lamps. As the character approaches the ornate balcony and glowing signage of the Henry Gosling building, the camera follows them past a seated NPC toward the structure's entrance. The scene then shifts as the character turns onto a narrow sidewalk, leaving the building behind to move between a wrought iron fence and a row of historic facades. Finally, the perspective opens toward a distant intersection where the headlights of a street tram cut through the hazy night air.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling urban intersection into a quieter, more intimate historic street. It begins in a wide cobblestone square where the character navigates through a moderate crowd of pedestrians as a glowing street tram passes from left to right. As the character moves forward, the open space of the intersection narrows into a medium-width street lined with historic facades. The scene then shifts from the activity of the square to a more serene atmosphere, passing a parked horse-drawn carriage and wooden benches under the glow of gas lamps. Finally, the camera settles into the stillness of the wet cobblestones, where the crowd thins and long shadows stretch across the pavement.
